## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Biologica and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress and improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI-generated content quality is improving, but intro paragraphs need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [New image generation using Nano Banana shows promise for skin textures](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Blog layout on staging site needs adjustments (font, spacing, excerpt placement)](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Next batch of articles to focus on reproductive years and postmenopause topics](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [AI-generated content showing better flow and fewer repetitions](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Mentions in articles are improving but need smoother transitions](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Compound sentences reduced, favoring clearer, shorter sentences](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Using GPT-4.5 has noticeably improved output quality](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### First Paragraph Refinement

  - [Intro paragraphs still need work; often too generic or disconnected](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Strategy: Provide 10 examples of good intro paragraphs for AI to model](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Elizabeth to compile examples from existing approved articles](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)

### Blog Layout and Styling Issues

  - [Staging site shows font inconsistencies and unusual spacing](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Excerpt placement needs adjustment (currently appears twice)](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Text color rendering as gray instead of black in some sections](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Pop-in text effect may negatively impact Google indexing](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Image Generation

  - [New batch of AI-generated images using Nano Banana shows improved skin textures](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Team to provide more specific guidelines for desired image style (e.g., abstract, black and white photography)](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
  - [Consider adding interstitial images after content is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Next Batch of Articles

  - [Focus on reproductive years and postmenopause topics](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [Prioritize content that can be reviewed by Nancy (medical perspective)](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Matt to propose topics for Brian's approval](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elizabeth to compile examples of good intro paragraphs and send to Matt](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Brian to flag layout issues to the development team for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Matt to refine AI prompts based on new image style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Team to work on specific image guidelines next week](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Matt to propose topics for the next batch of articles, focusing on reproductive years and postmenopause](https://fathom.video/share/PxkTutmuWVpiz2MJdMzBw69M7udpzGUA?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
